title: The Basement Server Pack
description: This is the server pack for my modded sub server (The Basement)!
body:
This is the server pack for my modded sub server (The Basement)!

To play on the server you must be subscribed to [https://www.twitch.tv/tubbo](https://www.twitch.tv/tubbo)

To get whitelisted on the server go to [https://linknsync.live/](https://linknsync.live/)
